title: QS stringify skips nullish and empty containers while preserving empty strings
prompt: Fix stringifyQuery so it matches qs-style empty-value handling for this benchmark slice: null and undefined values should be skipped, empty objects and empty arrays should not emit entries, empty strings should be preserved, and nested object encoding should still use bracket notation.
golden_patch_description: Match qs-style nullish skipping and empty-container omission while preserving empty strings and nested bracket encoding.
instance_notes: Compact qs stringify slice derived from skipNulls and empty-container semantics documented in the qs README and exercised by upstream stringify tests.
